---
title: "Procrastination, stress, and self-rated health: A multi-sample meta-analysis"
date: 2025-08-13
author:
  - name: "Cormac Monaghan"
    url: "https://c-monaghan.github.io/"
    orcid: "https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9012-3060"
    affiliation:
      - "Hamilton Institute, Maynooth University"
      - "Department of Psychology, Maynooth University"
  - name: "Fuschia Sirois"
    url: "https://fuschiasirois.com/"
    orcid: "https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0927-277X"
    affiliation: "Department of Psychology, Durham University"
categories:
  - procrastination
  - self rated health
  - meta analysis
pub-info:
  reference: >-
     <a href="https://www.durham.ac.uk/staff/fuschia-sirois/">Sirois, F</a> & <strong>Monaghan, C</strong>. Procrastination, stress, and self-rated health: A multi-sample meta-analysis.
pub-status:
  status: Writing
  class: warning
  icon: fa-solid fa-pencil
---
